title: Your privacy
lead: Typify doesn't ask for your email or password. Your progress stays on this device unless your teacher gave you a class code.

sections.h: What we keep on your device
sections.p: Your nickname, your mascot, your typing scores, and your unlocked stickers. Nothing leaves the device unless you joined a classroom.

When your teacher gave you a class code, Typify sends your lesson scores and mini-game results to a small database so your teacher can see your progress. We do not send your real name, your email, or anything else.
Settings → Reset my data wipes everything on your device in one tap. If you joined a classroom, your teacher will see the new state from your next lesson.
Ask a parent or teacher if anything here is unclear.
